sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Equifax Inc.: How a Legacy Credit Bureau Is Rebranding as a Global Data & AI Platform
feed.summary: Equifax Inc. is transforming from a traditional credit bureau into a global data, analytics, and AI platform, focusing on cloud-native operations and real-time decisioning. This strategic shift leverages its extensive consumer and business data to underpin decisions across various sectors like lending, employment, and insurance. The company aims to drive growth and valuation by offering integrated data, AI-driven solutions, and vertical platforms, differentiating itself from competitors like Experian and TransUnion through its strong employment data franchise and cloud modernization.

feed.title: Salesforce (CRM) Receives Updated Analyst Rating from Barclays |
feed.summary: Barclays analyst Raimo Lenschow has maintained an "Overweight" rating for Salesforce (CRM) and increased the price target from $330.00 to $338.00. This 2.42% increase reflects positive sentiment towards the company's market performance. Other analysts have also recently updated their ratings and price targets for Salesforce, contributing to an average target price of $323.12 among 48 analysts, suggesting a potential upside of 24.35%.

feed.title: Newmont Soars As Gold Reaches Record Highs Amid Fed Turmoil
feed.summary: Newmont (NYSE: NEM) shares are trading higher as gold prices reach record highs due to a criminal investigation into Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell. This investigation has weakened the U.S. dollar, driving investors towards safe-haven assets like gold and silver. Newmont exhibits strong bullish momentum, with significant increases in share price and a positive technical outlook.

feed.title: Citi (C) to Cut About 1,000 Jobs This Week as CEO Jane Fraser Trims Costs
feed.summary: Citigroup Inc. is planning to cut approximately 1,000 jobs this week as part of CEO Jane Fraser's strategy to reduce costs and enhance profitability. This move is part of a larger plan announced two years ago to eliminate 20,000 jobs by the end of 2026. At the end of September, the company reported having 227,000 employees.

feed.title: Archer-Daniels-Midland (ADM) Valuation Check After Cottonseed Joint Venture And Mixed Investor Sentiment
feed.summary: Archer-Daniels-Midland (ADM) recently announced a joint venture with Planters Cotton Oil Mill, consolidating cottonseed processing, amidst mixed investor sentiment from institutional selling and analyst downgrades. Despite a one-year return of 23.48%, the stock is considered 8.5% overvalued with a fair value of US$57.09 against its current price of US$61.94, largely influenced by expected policy support and capacity upgrades in biofuels.

feed.title: How Investors May Respond To Arch Capital Group (ACGL) Q4 2025 Earnings Beat And Premium Growth
feed.summary: Arch Capital Group Ltd. (ACGL) will release its Q4 2025 earnings on February 9, 2026, with an investor call on February 10. The company has a history of beating earnings estimates and demonstrating strong revenue and premium growth, reinforcing investor focus on its underwriting and premium-growth engine. The upcoming earnings release will provide further details on premium growth, catastrophe losses, and margins, influencing the investment narrative for ACGL, which is currently trading near a 52-week high.

feed.title: Invesco Ltd. stock: measured optimism as Wall Street eyes yield, flows and fee pressure
feed.summary: Invesco Ltd. stock is showing measured optimism as it navigates market challenges like higher interest rates, volatile asset flows, and fee pressure. Despite these headwinds, the company has quietly outperformed its recent past, with a one-year total return approaching 17-18% for patient investors. Wall Street analysts maintain a "Hold" rating, clustering price targets slightly above the current quote, anticipating steady, dividend-supported returns rather than dramatic growth.

feed.title: Oceania Cruises Joins Growing Adults-Only Cruise Market With 2026 Shift
feed.summary: Oceania Cruises announced its transition to an adults-only experience for all new sailings beginning in early 2026, welcoming guests aged 18 and over. This decision followed extensive guest research indicating a demand for a more tranquil onboard atmosphere. The move aligns Oceania with other luxury cruise lines like Virgin Voyages and Viking who cater exclusively to adult travelers.

feed.title: Three Garmin executives sell company shares worth nearly $3.5M
feed.summary: Three Garmin executives recently sold company shares totaling nearly $3.5 million through prearranged trading plans. This transaction follows previous reports of Garmin executives selling significant amounts of company stock. The sales were conducted by top executives of the company, headquartered in Olathe.

feed.title: Take-Two (TTWO) Wins Tribunal Decision Against Former Employees' Pay Request
feed.summary: Take-Two Interactive (TTWO) recently won a tribunal decision against former Rockstar Games employees who were seeking interim pay while alleging dismissal due to union activities. An employment judge determined the claimants did not have a strong chance of proving their termination was linked to union involvement. Despite this legal win, the company exhibits mixed financial signals, including declining margins and insider selling, though institutional ownership remains high.

feed.title: Honeywell stock flat as new Google Cloud retail tech lands, Citi trims target ahead of earnings
feed.summary: Honeywell shares remained stable after the launch of new software tools for retail and warehouse operations, despite Citi trimming its price target but maintaining a buy rating. The company is set to release its Q4 results and 2026 outlook on January 29, with investors watching for growth and margin improvements, especially from its new AI-powered "Smart Shopping Platform" developed with Google Cloud. Analysts forecast a rise in quarterly earnings to $2.57 per share and full-year earnings reaching $10.60 in 2026.

feed.title: Barclays Issues Pessimistic Forecast for Paycom Software (NYSE:PAYC) Stock Price
feed.summary: Barclays has lowered its price target for Paycom Software (NYSE:PAYC) from $210 to $185, maintaining an "equal weight" rating, with this new target suggesting a 17.3% upside. Several other brokerage firms have also recently trimmed their price targets for PAYC, resulting in a consensus "Hold" rating and an average price target of $218.07. The pessimistic outlook follows Paycom's slight EPS miss and its stock trading below its 200-day moving average.

feed.title: The Truth About Arista Networks Inc.: Why Wall Street Can’t Stop Buying This Boring Stock
feed.summary: This article examines why Arista Networks Inc. (ANET) is gaining significant attention from Wall Street, despite not being a mainstream meme stock. It highlights Arista's crucial role in AI and cloud infrastructure, its high-margin business model, and its position as a momentum play in the tech sector. The piece also compares Arista to its main competitor, Cisco Systems, and provides a "cop or drop" verdict for potential investors.

feed.title: Simon Property Group: Not The Fattest Yield But One Of The Most Attractive (NYSE:SPG)
feed.summary: Simon Property Group (SPG) offers an attractive 4.80% dividend yield, well-covered by its 2025 FFO guidance. The REIT continues to expand its portfolio with new acquisitions, demonstrating strong performance in the retail property market. While its preferred stocks have seen some underperformance due to elevated Treasury yields, they still provide a healthy income at a 7.84% current yield.

feed.title: From Storms To Servers: Why Generac Holdings' Moment May Be Here (NYSE:GNRC)
feed.summary: Generac Holdings Inc. is becoming increasingly important in supplying large diesel generators to support the growing demand from AI data centers, which are straining existing grid capacities. The company's commercial and industrial sales have seen a significant rise, driven by early shipments of megawatt-scale units targeted at data centers. This growing demand is reflected in a doubled backlog for large generators, prompting Generac to expand its manufacturing capacity.

feed.title: Topgolf Callaway Brands (NYSE:MODG) Reaches New 12-Month High - What's Next?
feed.summary: Topgolf Callaway Brands (NYSE:MODG) stock recently hit a new 52-week high of $13.95, and the company's board authorized a $200 million share repurchase program. Despite this, analysts have a mixed view, with an average "Hold" rating and a price target below the current stock price, though some have raised their targets. The company's underlying fundamentals show weakness with a recent earnings per share beat but materially missed revenue expectations, alongside negative net margin and P/E ratio.

feed.title: Precision Neuroscience, Medtronic partner on BCI tech
feed.summary: Precision Neuroscience and Medtronic have formed a strategic partnership to advance brain-computer interface (BCI) technology. They plan to co-develop an integrated solution combining Precision's FDA-cleared Layer 7 cortical interface with Medtronic’s StealthStation surgical navigation system. This collaboration aims to provide surgeons with real-time functional and structural information during operations, enhancing precision in neurosurgical procedures and accelerating BCI technology adoption.

feed.title: EPAM Systems: Bullish About Financial Improvement Potential (NYSE:EPAM)
feed.summary: The author reiterates a "Buy" rating for EPAM Systems (EPAM), anticipating accelerated revenue growth and wider operating margins in 2026. This positive outlook is based on EPAM's strategic partnerships, market share gains, cost optimization efforts, and a shift towards higher-value work. The shares are also considered attractively priced compared to peers and historical valuations.

feed.title: How Chevron played the long game for Venezuela’s oil reserves
feed.summary: Chevron has strategically maintained its presence in Venezuela, positioning itself to profit from the country's vast oil reserves despite political turmoil and U.S. sanctions. The company's "long game," including extensive lobbying and strong ties to the Trump administration, allowed it to secure licenses and significantly increase production. While this benefits Chevron and the Trump administration's agenda, experts question its long-term viability for Venezuela given the country's decaying infrastructure, massive debt, and ongoing political instability.

feed.title: AI Overtake in Visual Media? The Coca-Cola Holiday Ad and Katseye’s “Internet Girl” Prompter
feed.summary: This article discusses the growing presence of AI in visual media, highlighting two prominent examples from 2025: Coca-Cola's AI-generated holiday commercials and the girl group Katseye's "Internet Girl" visualizer, which credited an "AI prompter." Both instances sparked public debate about authenticity, emotional depth, and the role of AI in creative industries, while also touching upon evolving regulatory standards for disclosing synthetic content in advertising.

feed.title: Alphabet’s Wing Adds 150 Walmart Stores to Drone Delivery Program
feed.summary: Alphabet's drone delivery company, Wing, is significantly expanding its partnership with Walmart, adding 150 new store locations for drone delivery services, starting with Houston and soon expanding to Orlando, Tampa, and Charlotte. The company plans to reach 270 Walmart stores in various major cities by 2027, including Los Angeles and Miami. This expansion builds on successful drone delivery operations in the Dallas-Fort Worth Metroplex and Atlanta, offering quick delivery of everyday items.

feed.title: JP Morgan Lowers Price Target for American Tower (AMT) to $245
feed.summary: JP Morgan analyst Richard Choe maintained an 'Overweight' rating for American Tower (AMT) but lowered the price target from $250.00 to $245.00 USD. This adjustment comes amidst several recent analyst actions on AMT stock, including downgrades and price target reductions from other firms. Despite the lower price target, the average target price from 19 analysts implies a 31.70% upside from American Tower's current price, with a consensus brokerage recommendation of "Outperform."

feed.title: Verizon stock slips in regular trade as ex-dividend date hits, earnings loom
feed.summary: Verizon Communications Inc. shares slipped by 1.6% in Monday afternoon trading as the stock went ex-dividend on January 12th. Investors are now looking ahead to the release of Verizon's fourth-quarter 2025 earnings on January 30th amidst wider market volatility and competitive pressures in the telecom sector. The company's consistent dividend increases aim to reflect its commitment to shareholders, though potential changes in interest rates or weaker cash flow could impact its appeal.

feed.title: TetraScience Collaborates with Thermo Fisher to Advance Scientific AI Across Biopharma R&D
feed.summary: TetraScience announced a collaboration with Thermo Fisher Scientific to accelerate Scientific AI in biopharma R&D and manufacturing. The partnership aims to transform scientific data into an AI-native form and develop intelligent workflows at scale. This initiative will integrate Thermo Fisher’s instrumentation with TetraScience's platform to enhance data management, reproducibility, and scalability in drug discovery and development.

feed.title: CTRA: JP Morgan Lowers Price Target, Maintains Overweight Rating
feed.summary: JP Morgan has maintained its "Overweight" rating for Coterra Energy (CTRA) but lowered the price target from $34.00 to $31.00. This adjustment reflects an 8.82% decrease in the target price, despite other analysts maintaining generally positive outlooks with some recent price target increases. Coterra Energy operates in oil and gas development, exploration, and production, primarily in the Permian Basin, Marcellus Shale, and Anadarko Basin.

feed.title: Trimble Inc.: The Quiet Infrastructure OS Powering the Next Wave of Smart Construction and Geospatia
feed.summary: Trimble Inc. is presented as a comprehensive infrastructure operating system, integrating hardware, software, and cloud services for construction, agriculture, logistics, and geospatial technologies. The article highlights Trimble's competitive advantages in providing end-to-end solutions, leveraging software over hardware, deep domain specialization, and strategic interoperability, all contributing to its strong market position and valuation. Despite competition, Trimble's focus on recurring revenue and addressing industry pain points positions it as a critical technology for the built environment.

feed.title: Chipotle Announces Free Double Protein on January 13
feed.summary: Chipotle is offering free double protein on bowls, burritos, and salads for Chipotle Rewards members on January 13, 2026. This promotion, redeemable with code PROTEIN for digital orders, coincides with popular workout days in January. The offer applies to various protein options and is also valid for items from Chipotle’s new High Protein Menu, which includes options like the Double High Protein Bowl and Josh Hart’s High Protein Burrito.

feed.title: Caterpillar Launches AI Assistant for Equipment Management
feed.summary: Caterpillar Inc. has introduced Cat AI Assistant at CES 2026, marking its entry into AI-powered fleet management for heavy equipment. This new conversational AI tool aims to streamline equipment operations by linking Caterpillar's digital applications into a single interface. The system will provide predictive maintenance, step-by-step repair guidance for technicians, and real-time in-cab coaching for operators, addressing skilled labor shortages in construction.

feed.title: Key facts: Goldman Sachs raises Microsoft target; Bank of America sees $300B bonds; Microsoft upgrades Foundry
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has increased its price target for Microsoft (MSFT) to $655, maintaining a Buy rating, citing AI sector strength. Bank of America projects that Microsoft and other major tech companies will issue between $140 billion and $300 billion in corporate bonds annually for the next three years to fund AI investments. Microsoft has also enhanced its Foundry platform with Claude integration, specifically benefiting healthcare and life sciences clients.

feed.title: Key facts: AbbVie partners with RemeGen; acquires West Pharma rights
feed.summary: AbbVie has announced a partnership with RemeGen to develop RC148 for advanced solid tumors, involving an upfront payment of $650 million and up to $4.95 billion in milestones. Additionally, AbbVie is acquiring manufacturing rights for West Pharmaceutical's SmartDose 3.5mL system for $112.5 million, a deal expected to close by mid-2026. Analysts at Berenberg view AbbVie as a major pharmaceutical player with substantial financial capacity for future mergers and acquisitions.

feed.title: Key facts: Capital One to report Q4 earnings January 22; $425M settlement; shares priced at $249.20
feed.summary: Capital One Financial (COF) is set to report its Q4 earnings on January 22. The company will address a proposed interest rate cap requiring congressional approval and has agreed to a $425 million class action settlement related to misleading consumers about its 360 Savings program. Currently, COF shares are priced at $249.20, with analysts suggesting a 12% implied upside potential to a consensus price target of $279.20.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs stock ticks up as Powell probe threat, rate-cap talk keep banks on edge
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs shares rose by 0.6% ahead of its Q4 earnings report, as markets react to twin pressures: a potential probe into Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell by the Trump administration and President Trump's proposal for a 10% cap on credit card interest rates. Investors are also preparing for the start of Q4 earnings season and the release of the U.S. consumer price index, with particular attention on Goldman's advisory and underwriting fees, trading results, and expenses. The article highlights concerns about Fed independence and the potential impact of high inflation data on Treasury yields and risk assets.

feed.title: Automakers' share in China NEV market in 2025: BYD leads with 27.2%, Tesla 5th with 4.9%
feed.summary: In 2025, BYD maintained its lead in China's new energy vehicle (NEV) market with a 27.2% share, despite a 6.3% year-on-year sales decline. Tesla, ranking fifth, saw its market share drop to 4.9% from 6.0% in 2024. Geely and Changan also showed significant growth in the NEV and overall passenger vehicle markets, respectively.

feed.title: Steel Dynamics Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Earnings Conference Call and Webcast
feed.summary: Steel Dynamics, Inc. (NASDAQ/GS: STLD) will release its Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 financial results before market open on Monday, January 26, 2026. A conference call hosted by key executives, including Chairman and CEO Mark D. Millett, will follow at 11:00 a.m. EST, accessible via dial-in or the company's website. An audio replay will also be available for a limited time.

feed.title: Starbucks Unusual Options Activity For January 12
feed.summary: Deep-pocketed investors have shown a bullish interest in Starbucks (NASDAQ: SBUX) through unusual options activity, with Benzinga's scanner identifying 14 extraordinary options trades. Analysis of these trades indicates a divided sentiment, with 64% bullish and 28% bearish, and a predicted price range target for Starbucks between $55.0 and $115.0 over the last three months. Two analysts currently cover Starbucks, with price targets ranging from $86 to $110, and the company's earnings announcement is expected in 15 days.

feed.title: BNY Mellon (BK) Earnings Anticipation: Consensus Set at $1.98
feed.summary: BNY Mellon (BK) is expected to announce an earnings per share of $1.98, with its report due before the market opens tomorrow. The company, a global leader in investment management and services with $52.1 trillion in assets under custody, exhibits robust financial health with a strong net margin and a high Piotroski F-Score. While its valuation metrics are approaching historical highs, analyst sentiment remains cautiously optimistic, and its strong institutional ownership underscores investor confidence despite inherent sector risks.

feed.title: NANO Nuclear Energy Extends Relationship with the University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign to Construct and Operate the First KRONOS MMR™ Energy System on U.S. University Land
feed.summary: NANO Nuclear Energy Inc. has signed an MOU with the University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign to develop, construct, and operate its KRONOS MMR™ microreactor on campus. This collaboration aims to deploy the first KRONOS MMR™ on U.S. university land, aligning with Illinois' carbon reduction goals and positioning the university as a key innovation hub. The project will involve joint committees, regulatory engagements, and significant investment in engineering and testing, with U. of I. ultimately assuming ownership and operational responsibility.

feed.title: L3Harris Technologies (NYSE:LHX) Sets New 1-Year High - Should You Buy?
feed.summary: L3Harris Technologies (LHX) recently hit a new 52-week high of $341.82, with positive analyst sentiment including a "Moderate Buy" consensus and a $302.29 target price. The company exceeded Q3 expectations with $2.70 EPS and $5.66 billion revenue, and offered strong FY2025 guidance. Insider activity shows CEO Christopher Kubasik sold some shares, while institutional investors hold a significant majority of the stock.

feed.title: Financial stocks fall as Trump's credit card rate cap plan rattles investors
feed.summary: Financial stocks, particularly those of U.S. and UK lenders, experienced a decline after former President Donald Trump proposed a one-year cap of 10% on credit card interest rates, threatening a significant revenue stream for the industry. Major banks like JPMorgan Chase and Bank of America saw their shares drop, along with consumer finance firms and payment processors. While analysts expressed skepticism about the proposal becoming law, concerns were raised that such a cap could force lenders to reduce credit access for riskier borrowers and push consumers towards more expensive, non-bank debt options.

feed.title: You can get free double protein at Chipotle on Jan. 13. Here's how.
feed.summary: Chipotle is offering free double protein on January 13th for Chipotle Rewards members who place digital orders. Customers can use the code "PROTEIN" on bowls, burritos, or salads to receive an extra scoop of protein, including options from their new "High Protein Menu." This initiative aims to cater to athletes and health-conscious individuals, making it easier for them to get more protein.

feed.title: Long-Term Investors in shares of Fortinet, Inc. (NASDAQ: FTNT) should contact the Shareholders Foundation
feed.summary: The Shareholders Foundation announced an investigation into Fortinet, Inc. (NASDAQ: FTNT) on behalf of current long-term investors. This investigation follows a lawsuit alleging that Fortinet directors and officers made materially false and misleading statements regarding a "record" FortiGate unit upgrade cycle. Investors who held Fortinet shares during the period of alleged misrepresentation are encouraged to contact the Shareholders Foundation for options.

feed.title: Lawsuit Alert: Investors who lost money with shares of F5, Inc.
feed.summary: A lawsuit has been filed on behalf of investors in F5, Inc. (NASDAQ: FFIV) who allegedly suffered losses due to securities laws violations. The lawsuit claims F5 failed to disclose a significant security incident involving a nation-state threat actor gaining persistent access to their systems, ultimately affecting their business prospects and leading to a stock decline. Investors who purchased F5 shares between October 28, 2024, and October 27, 2025, are encouraged to contact the Shareholders Foundation by the February 17, 2026 deadline.

feed.title: J.M. Smucker stock: defensive staple or value trap as Wall Street turns cautious?
feed.summary: J.M. Smucker's stock is experiencing a choppy trading range, leading investors to question if it represents a value opportunity or prolonged stagnation. The company faces challenges from cautious consumers, integration risks in its pet food division, and competition, causing Wall Street analysts to adopt a cautious "Hold" stance. Its future performance depends on stabilizing volumes, proving profitability in pet food integration, disciplined capital allocation, and the broader economic climate.

feed.title: International Seaways stock hits 52-week high at 55.19 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: International Seaways Inc (INSW) stock has reached a 52-week high of $55.19, driven by significant gains over the past year, including a 43.57% total return and a 40.48% six-month gain. The company boasts "GREAT" financial health according to InvestingPro, with a P/E ratio of 12.53 and a dividend yield of 5.39%. This performance highlights strong investor confidence and the company's ability to capitalize on opportunities in the maritime shipping sector, often moving opposite to broader market trends.

feed.title: TetraScience Collaborates with Thermo Fisher to Advance Scientific AI Across Biopharma R&D
feed.summary: TetraScience announced a collaboration with Thermo Fisher Scientific to accelerate AI in biopharma R&D and manufacturing. The partnership aims to transform scientific data into an AI-native form and develop intelligent workflows by integrating Thermo Fisher’s solutions with TetraScience’s Scientific Data Foundry and Tetra AI. This collaboration will help biopharmaceutical organizations improve reproducibility, throughput, and scalability in therapies, fostering scientific breakthroughs.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean Cruises (NYSE:RCL) Given New $330.00 Price Target at Bank of America
feed.summary: Bank of America has increased its price target for Royal Caribbean Cruises (NYSE:RCL) from $325.00 to $330.00, maintaining a "neutral" rating. This new target implies a potential upside of 9.09% from the current stock price. Other analysts have also recently adjusted their ratings and price objectives for the cruise company.

feed.title: Source: Boeing tells employees about layoffs at Defense supply chain work group
feed.summary: Boeing is planning to cut approximately 10% of jobs within its Boeing Defense, Space & Security (BDS) Supply Chain work group, according to an internal source. This move is part of the company's continuous efforts to reduce costs, following a broader workforce reduction of 10% across its entire workforce in late 2024. While Boeing has not confirmed specific numbers, it indicated that the layoffs would not impact engineering or machinist unions and are focused solely on a small percentage of the BDS Supply Chain.

feed.title: Norwegian Cruise Line (NYSE:NCLH) Price Target Raised to $30.00 at Bank of America
feed.summary: Bank of America has raised its price target for Norwegian Cruise Line (NYSE:NCLH) from $25.00 to $30.00, maintaining a "neutral" rating on the stock and suggesting a potential upside of 23.94%. Other analysts have offered varied ratings and price targets, with the company currently holding a "Moderate Buy" average rating and an average target price of $27.53 based on MarketBeat.com data. The article also details recent insider buying activity and institutional investor movements for NCLH.

feed.title: Coterra Energy (NYSE:CTRA) Price Target Cut to $31.00 by Analysts at JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has lowered its price target for Coterra Energy (NYSE:CTRA) from $34.00 to $31.00, while maintaining an "overweight" rating. This new target suggests a potential upside of 25.38% from the current stock price. Other analysts also adjusted their price objectives for CTRA, with the consensus rating remaining a "Moderate Buy" and an average price target of $32.73.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Cuts Crown Castle (NYSE:CCI) Price Target to $110.00
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has lowered its price target for Crown Castle (NYSE:CCI) from $115.00 to $110.00, maintaining a "neutral" rating. This adjustment implies a potential upside of nearly 30% from the stock's previous close. Other analysts have also recently updated their ratings and price targets for Crown Castle, which currently holds an average rating of "Moderate Buy" with an average target price of $110.06.
